final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: interior editorial photo, landscape crop
Primary request: a serene Neo-Chinese-style tea room designed for quiet contemplation and tea drinking
Scene/backdrop: refined tea room interior; background wall adorned with hanging calligraphy scrolls and a carefully shaped bonsai tree; window reveals swaying bamboo shadows outside
Subject: natural solid-wood tea table (raw wood grain finish) set with a Yixing zisha teapot and matching zisha tea cups arranged for a tea ceremony
Style/medium: photorealistic architectural interior photography, soft editorial tone
Composition/framing: medium wide shot, slightly elevated angle, 35mm lens, balanced symmetrical framing
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight filtering through rice-paper window panels, dappled bamboo shadow patterns cast across the floor, tranquil and meditative Zen atmosphere
Color palette: warm raw wood tones + deep zisha clay brown + muted ink-wash grey + soft celadon green from bonsai foliage
Materials/textures: visible wood grain on tea table surface, matte unglazed zisha clay texture on teapot and cups, aged paper texture on calligraphy scrolls, smooth stone or tatami floor
Constraints: keep the composition uncluttered and meditative; bamboo shadows must be visible through or on the window; no modern appliances or Western elements
Avoid: overly saturated colors, plastic-looking surfaces, cluttered styling, deformed teapot spout
